name: Virtue Ethics
tagline: The good life is built through character, not rules or outcomes.
summary: Virtue ethics asks not 'what should I do?' but 'what kind of person should I become?' It teaches that flourishing — eudaimonia — comes from cultivating stable virtues through practice, guided by practical wisdom and embedded in community.

quotes.text: We are what we repeatedly do.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: Happiness is activity of the soul in accordance with virtue.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: One swallow does not make a spring.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: We become just by doing just acts.
quotes.author: Aristotle
